name: Peanutty Caramel Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a medium microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave on high for 2 to 3 and ½ minutes, stirring every minute until smooth.
3. Serve as a dip with marshmallows, strawberries, apple slices, or pound cake pieces.
4. Alternatively, use it as a sauce over ice cream.
